report.summary: Deep UX polish pass on 2 new learn guides (Virtuals Protocol, GRASS Protocol DePIN): added accessible table regions with keyboard scrolling, scope attributes on table headers, reduced-motion media queries, Safari VoiceOver list role fixes, and mobile-friendly funding card layout. OG images verified present from earlier cycle.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Virtuals Protocol: Added role='region', aria-label, tabIndex to tokenomics table wrapper for keyboard-accessible scrolling
Virtuals Protocol: Added role='region', aria-label, tabIndex to competitive landscape comparison table wrapper
Virtuals Protocol: Added minWidth (480px/520px) to both tables to prevent column collapse on mobile
Virtuals Protocol: Added scope='col' to all <th> elements for screen reader column identification
Virtuals Protocol: Added WebkitOverflowScrolling: 'touch' for smooth mobile table scrolling
Virtuals Protocol: Added role='list' to risk factors <ul> for Safari VoiceOver compatibility
Virtuals Protocol: Added @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) to disable hover transforms for motion-sensitive users
GRASS Protocol: Added role='region', aria-label, tabIndex to tokenomics table wrapper for keyboard-accessible scrolling
GRASS Protocol: Added minWidth (520px) to tokenomics table to prevent column collapse on mobile
GRASS Protocol: Added scope='col' to all <th> elements for screen reader column identification
GRASS Protocol: Added WebkitOverflowScrolling: 'touch' for smooth mobile table scrolling
GRASS Protocol: Added role='list' to risk factors <ul> for Safari VoiceOver compatibility
GRASS Protocol: Added @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) to disable hover transforms for motion-sensitive users
GRASS Protocol: Improved funding round card layout with flex-basis and min-width for better wrapping on narrow screens

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG images verified present from earlier design cycle: og-virtuals-protocol-guide.svg (1200x630)
OG images verified present from earlier design cycle: og-grass-protocol-depin-guide.svg (1200x630)
No additional visual assets needed — both pages fully covered

sections.title: UX Audit Findings (Deferred, cumulative)
items: Section spacing inconsistency across learn guides: some use 40px, others 44px, others 48px — recommend standardizing in a shared layout component
Global :focus-visible styles should be added to globals.css for all interactive elements site-wide
Heading hierarchy varies across guides: some skip h3 level — recommend standardizing h1>h2>h3>h4
TOC nav should be a shared component with built-in focus ring and hover underline styles
Consider extracting common article layout (glass card patterns, section spacing, table wrappers) into a shared LearnArticleLayout component
